body:
# 💰 **PHANTOM BLOODLINE DONATIONS** 💰 

Our in-game donation system is now active.

If you want to support the crew, you can now donate **INGAME CASH** through the donation bar 💸

Every donation helps us bring more to the crew:
➥ **New fits** 👕
➥ **Custom liveries** 🚘
➥ **Crew projects & upgrades** ⚙️
➥ **More content for everyone** 🔥

If you want to donate, open a ticket through
https://dis
